title: Finally… A NotebookLM Alternative With an API
summary: Open Notebook is a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Google NotebookLM that enables developers to build AI workflows with private documents, code, and research. It supports grounded question-answering and podcast generation from source materials and offers an API for integration.
writeup: The video covers Open Notebook, a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Google NotebookLM aimed at developers building AI workflows over private documents, code, and research. It matters because it pairs the familiar NotebookLM feature set with self-hosting and an API for integration, keeping source materials in a controlled environment. Concrete takeaways: the tool supports grounded question-answering and podcast generation from source materials, and it exposes an API so the capabilities can be wired into other systems.
